ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
almond milk 63 % (water, almond puree 15 %), rapeseed oil, rice flour, water, garlic and herbs (2,7 %), inulin, lemon juice concentrate, salt, natural flavours of garlic and parsley, pepper,
may contain traces of milk,
100% of agricultural ingredients are of plant origin,
